name: Habiganj Net Communications
notes: HNC has been one of the providers of internet services in Habiganj District in Bangladesh. We provide High-speed internet service for home and corporate users according to the need of customers’ aspirations. We have an experienced and expert support team to provide any solution about broadband internet and data connectivity within a short time. We are currently serving many more corporate and home users across Zonal (North-East). We are able to design, install, test, and verify the Local Area Network (LAN). Our best teams of highly qualified and experienced engineers whom we guarantee will provide the height possible standards of workmanship. We are always one step ahead in this competitive field.
